seo.title: Building AI Email Assistant with Vercel AI SDK + Vex Guardrails
seo.description: Learn how to build ai email assistant with Vercel AI SDK + Vex guardrails. Detect failures, prevent drift, and ensure reliability.
keywords: Vercel AI SDK ai email assistant

content.intro: Build a production-ready AI Email Assistant using Vercel AI SDK to handle intent detection, draft generation, attachment processing, and send approvals with seamless streaming UIs. Guardrails are essential for this high-risk use case to prevent PII leaks, inappropriate tone, invalid recipients, and hallucinated content that could damage professional relationships or expose confidential data. Vex provides runtime verification to ensure safe, reliable email operations at scale.

architectureOverview.heading: AI Email Assistant Architecture with Vercel AI SDK
architectureOverview.description:
The AI Email Assistant processes incoming emails through a Vercel Edge Function that uses Vercel AI SDK's generateText or streamText for intent classification (reply, forward, archive). It extracts PII, detects attachments, generates context-aware drafts, and routes to approval workflows. React Server Components stream responses to the UI while maintaining structured tool calls for recipient validation and content verification.

The agentic flow involves sequential LLM calls: first for intent/tone analysis, second for draft generation with RAG over user templates, and third for final safety checks before send approval. Vex middleware wraps these calls to verify outputs against business rules like domain whitelisting and confidentiality filters.

Edge deployment ensures low latency, but complex agent tasks risk timeouts and inconsistent structured outputs across providers like OpenAI and Anthropic.
architectureOverview.diagram:
┌─────────────────┐    ┌──────────────────┐    ┌─────────────────┐
│   Incoming      │───▶│ Vercel Edge Fn   │───▶│ Vex Middleware  │
│   Email API     │    │ + AI SDK         │    │   + Guardrails  │
└─────────────────┘    │ generateText()   │    └──────────┬──────┘
                       │ streamText()     │               │
                       │ Tool Calls       │               ▼
                       └──────────┬──────┘       ┌─────────────────┐
                                  │              │ LLM Provider    │
                       ┌──────────▼──────┐       │ (OpenAI/Groq)   │
                       │ React Server    │◀──────└─────────────────┘
                       │ Components UI   │
                       └─────────────────┘

Email Flow: Intent → Draft → PII Filter → Approval → Send

risks.name: PII Exposure in Drafts
risks.description: LLM hallucinations include sensitive data like SSNs or internal project names in email drafts
risks.mitigation: Vex PII entity extraction and redaction before streaming to UI

risks.name: Inappropriate Recipient Targeting
risks.description: Agent suggests wrong recipients or external domains violating company policy
risks.mitigation: Domain whitelisting and recipient validation in Vex structured output schema

risks.name: Tone Inappropriateness
risks.description: Streaming responses generate sarcastic, aggressive, or overly casual tone for professional emails
risks.mitigation: Vex sentiment analysis and tone classification guardrails

risks.name: Edge Timeout on Complex Tasks
risks.description: Multi-step agent workflows with attachment analysis exceed Vercel Edge limits
risks.mitigation: Vex task decomposition and async verification patterns

implementation.title: Email Intent Detection with Streaming
implementation.description: Classify email intent using Vercel AI SDK streamText with tool calls for categorization

implementation.title: Draft Generation with Context
implementation.description: Generate email drafts using RAG over user templates and conversation history

implementation.title: Attachment Processing Agent
implementation.description: Analyze attachments and extract relevant context for email responses

implementation.title: Send Approval Workflow
implementation.description: Final validation before sending with structured output for approval UI

vexIntegration.title: Vex Middleware for generateText
vexIntegration.description: Wrap generateText calls with Vex for PII filtering and tone verification

vexIntegration.title: Streaming with Partial Hallucination Protection
vexIntegration.description: Protect streamText from partial hallucinations using Vex streaming verification

vexIntegration.title: Structured Output Validation
vexIntegration.description: Ensure consistent tool call schemas across LLM providers with Vex
